short_interpretation: Vector+metadata is slightly higher on nDCG@10; hybrid ties P@1 and MRR.
Hybrid improves disease-specific ranking, consistent with added KG disease evidence and guardrails.
Hybrid improves hatchery/production-mode queries, likely from KG and intent-sensitive reranking.
Hybrid improves local queries overall, though exact lexical/local signals remain important.
Hybrid has higher nDCG@10, but vector_metadata has stronger P@1/MRR for this group.
